1056.issue: [W1056] admin 7.6.17 listed as dependency but 7.6.20 is recommended. Please consider updating globalDependency at [io-package.json](https://github.com/oweitman/ioBroker.openligadb/blob/master/io-package.json).

5005.issue: [S5005] Plain setTimeout() found in source files (coverage/prettify.js, lib/ioUtil.js). Please use this.setTimeout() or adapter.setTimeout() instead.

5054.issue: [S5054] method "setObject()" should be avoided. Please use "setObjectNotExists()" or "extendObject()" instead.

5601.issue: [S5601] i18n directory "admin/i18n" uses long format ({lang}/translations.json). Consider migrating to short format ({lang}.json) using "npm run translate convert".

5612.issue: [W5612] "admin/jsonConfig.json/items/mainTab" attribute "label" uses key "Main settings" which is not found in the English translation file at "admin/i18n/en".

6022.issue: [S6022] CHANGELOG_OLD.md exists but no link to it was found in [README.md](https://github.com/oweitman/ioBroker.openligadb/blob/master/README.md). Consider adding a link to CHANGELOG_OLD.md at the end of the Changelog section.

8004.issue: [W8004] Please process PR [[#814] "[iobroker-bot] Add Dependabot Ignore Rule for @types/node Major Version Updates"](https://github.com/oweitman/ioBroker.openligadb/issues/814)

8917.issue: [W8917] At least major versions of @types/node should not be updated by dependabot. Please add ignore block at dependabot.yml.

0028.issue: [W0028] Minimum node.js version 22 recommended. The current engines.node clause ">= 20" allows Node.js 20.0.0 as minimum. Please update it to require at least ">=22" at [package.json](https://github.com/oweitman/ioBroker.openligadb/blob/master/package.json).

0034.issue: [W0034] @iobroker/adapter-core 3.3.2 specified. 3.4.1 (or newer) is current. Please update dependencies at [package.json](https://github.com/oweitman/ioBroker.openligadb/blob/master/package.json)

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^25.9.3" at [package.json](https://github.com/oweitman/ioBroker.openligadb/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 20. Downgrade to node.js 20.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.
